records.m_Talk_ENG: We've entered the specified sealing coordinates, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've entered the specified sealing coordinates, ma'am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is extremely deep. Anything can happen here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is extremely deep. Anything can happen here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is extremely deep. Anything can happen here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister, please check if there are any hostiles being detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister, please check if there are any hostiles being detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister, please check if there are any hostiles being detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's even a chapel inside the ship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's even a chapel inside the ship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's even a chapel inside the ship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. Who would've thought I'd be on a Holy Curia ship, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. Who would've thought I'd be on a Holy Curia ship, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. Who would've thought I'd be on a Holy Curia ship, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Normally, we do not allow nonbelievers to be on board.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Normally, we do not allow nonbelievers to be on board.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Normally, we do not allow nonbelievers to be on board.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since this is an urgent matter, I will especially allow it this time. I should make a confession about this later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since this is an urgent matter, I will especially allow it this time. I should make a confession about this later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since this is an urgent matter, I will especially allow it this time. I should make a confession about this later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follower of the Society, you must hide your identity no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follower of the Society, you must hide your identity no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follower of the Society, you must hide your identity no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I won't tell a soul that I'm here on Regina's orders!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I won't tell a soul that I'm here on Regina's orders!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I won't tell a soul that I'm here on Regina's orders!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh.* Talking with you makes me miss Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh.* Talking with you makes me miss Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh.* Talking with you makes me miss Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am, a company of Shield Mercenary has finished preparations for the sacred mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am, a company of Shield Mercenary has finished preparations for the sacred mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am, a company of Shield Mercenary has finished preparations for the sacred mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just say the word. We'll cleanse the place under the Lord's name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just say the word. We'll cleanse the place under the Lord's name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just say the word. We'll cleanse the place under the Lord's name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The objective of today's sacred mission is reconnaissance. Please try to refrain from combat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The objective of today's sacred mission is reconnaissance. Please try to refrain from combat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The objective of today's sacred mission is reconnaissance. Please try to refrain from combat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Agent Burnett. When do you think the Institution's reinforcements will arrive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Agent Burnett. When do you think the Institution's reinforcements will arrive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Agent Burnett. When do you think the Institution's reinforcements will arrive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wha...? Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wha...? Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wha...? Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you asking me that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you asking me that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you asking me that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, who else shall I ask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, who else shall I ask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, who else shall I ask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The other Council members were deployed to protect the citizens under the highest-level disaster alert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The other Council members were deployed to protect the citizens under the highest-level disaster alert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The other Council members were deployed to protect the citizens under the highest-level disaster alert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, this was the most manpower we could gather at a moment's notice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, this was the most manpower we could gather at a moment's notice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, this was the most manpower we could gather at a moment's notice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Among them, we both are the only Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Among them, we both are the only Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Among them, we both are the only Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, we will have no means to deal with emergency situations if they occur.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, we will have no means to deal with emergency situations if they occur.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, we will have no means to deal with emergency situations if they occur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, the coordinates for where the Holy Grail is assumed to be were from the Institution, were they not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, the coordinates for where the Holy Grail is assumed to be were from the Institution, were they not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, the coordinates for where the Holy Grail is assumed to be were from the Institution, were they not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. What are you even talking about, paper nun?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. What are you even talking about, paper nun?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. What are you even talking about, paper nun?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We both are the only Counters? There's another...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We both are the only Counters? There's another...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We both are the only Counters? There's another...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Another...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Another...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is something wrong? You do not look so good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is something wrong? You do not look so good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is something wrong? You do not look so good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's not right...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's not right...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's not right...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel like... I'm forgetting something extremely important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel like... I'm forgetting something extremely important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel like... I'm forgetting something extremely important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Important? What do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Important? What do you mean by that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Important? What do you mean by that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way... I could forget something like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way... I could forget something like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way... I could forget something like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who was it...? The one who came up with this plan...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who was it...? The one who came up with this plan...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who was it...? The one who came up with this plan...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Do you want me to help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Do you want me to help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Do you want me to help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Physical therapy works best for acute memory loss!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Physical therapy works best for acute memory loss!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Physical therapy works best for acute memory loss!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am! Multiple hostiles detected!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am! Multiple hostiles detected!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am! Multiple hostiles detected!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those heathen C.O.s are latching onto the ship!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those heathen C.O.s are latching onto the ship!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those heathen C.O.s are latching onto the ship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Connect me to the ship's external feed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Connect me to the ship's external feed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Connect me to the ship's external feed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast of knowledge has been prepared. The banquet has started.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The number of hostiles latching onto the ship is increasing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The number of hostiles latching onto the ship is increasing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The number of hostiles latching onto the ship is increasing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am! The ship's output is decreasing as well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am! The ship's output is decreasing as well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am! The ship's output is decreasing as well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that some Remains got sucked into the engine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that some Remains got sucked into the engine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that some Remains got sucked into the engine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This... is an ambush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This... is an ambush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This... is an ambush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on? Remains don't have any flying capabilities, right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on? Remains don't have any flying capabilities, right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on? Remains don't have any flying capabilities, right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking back at how the Society handles Remains, this is probably not them flying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looking back at how the Society handles Remains, this is probably not them flying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking back at how the Society handles Remains, this is probably not them flying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe they are being catapulted toward us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe they are being catapulted toward us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe they are being catapulted toward us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Catapulted? What kind of reckless operation is that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Catapulted? What kind of reckless operation is that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Catapulted? What kind of reckless operation is that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be reckless, but seeing how they are able to execute an operation like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be reckless, but seeing how they are able to execute an operation like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be reckless, but seeing how they are able to execute an operation like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am aware.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am aware.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am aware.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.

root.m_Talk_DEU: It may be reckless, but seeing how they are able to execute an operation like this...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It may be reckless, but seeing how they are able to execute an operation like this...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The context of this situation shows that they have a battalion of troops waiting for us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? You mean there are still that many Society remnants left?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think all the troops that attacked the Institution have gathered here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thinking about it the other way around, it could be read as their attempt to protect <color=#ffd34c>something</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then that means we came to the right place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's our next move, Sister? The ship might crash before we even start fighting at this rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am aware.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am aware.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am aware.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All hands, commence Pieta's emergency landing, immediately!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's our turn now! Shield Mercenary! Get ready for combat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm already itching for a kill. Leave it to us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Currently, the enemy's size is unknown.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Under the Lord's grace, fight with caution.
